name: Miglior Cat Food Unico Mousse Pouch Lamb 85g
description: COMPLETE PET FOOD FOR ADULT CATS Migliorgatto UNICO is a complete and balanced super premium food, ideal for the daily diet of all cats. UNICO: single protein, unique quality, great taste. COMPOSITION: Lamb 65% (lungs, livers), minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 80%, Crude protein 10%, Crude fat 4%, Crude fibres 0.3%, Crude ash 1.5%. Without colorants and preservatives. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin D3 177.5 IU, Vitamin E 17.7 mg, Vitamin B1 1.8 mg, Vitamin B6 0.8 mg, Zinc (Zinc sulphate monohydrate) 1.3 mg, Manganese (Manganous sulphate monohydrate) 0.8 mg, Iodine (Potassium iodide) 0.2 mg. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place. DAILY RECOMMENDED AMOUNT Ideal weight (kg) 3 4 5 Daily amount (g) 215 255 340
